    "RX.2": 0.7,

  "active_set": [
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.7": "Verify reference accuracy, appropriate attribution, and basic coverage of relevant literature for the claims made, without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Disclose any uncertainty or limits in verifying citations given incomplete bibliographic details or access constraints.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid overstating the certainty of citation correctness or literature coverage beyond what can be substantiated.",
    "RX.3": "Maintain strict focus on citation and scholarship checks without venturing into rewriting, novelty claims, or methodological critiques.",
    "RX.4": "Prevent harm by avoiding misattribution or omission that could unfairly credit or discredit prior work.",
    "RX.5": "Ensure provenance by clearly tracing and documenting sources and checks performed during citation verification."
  }
}

rationale.R1.7: Verify reference accuracy, appropriate attribution, and basic coverage of relevant literature for the claims made, without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Disclose any uncertainty or limits in verifying citations given incomplete bibliographic details or access constraints.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid overstating the certainty of citation correctness or literature coverage beyond what can be substantiated.
rationale.RX.3: Maintain strict focus on citation and scholarship checks without venturing into rewriting, novelty claims, or methodological critiques.
rationale.RX.4: Prevent harm by avoiding misattribution or omission that could unfairly credit or discredit prior work.
rationale.RX.5: Ensure provenance by clearly tracing and documenting sources and checks performed during citation verification.
